payload: Verify the /api/health/startup-log endpoint returns the expected events after a fresh deploy: master_key_validated, db_pool_created, monitor_started. Check that the ring buffer trims correctly after 50 entries.

Add whale_score display to the Dashboard page wallet cards (both My Wallets and Whale Tracker sections). The field is now returned by /api/dashboard but Dashboard.jsx doesn't render it yet. Show a small score badge next to whale wallets.

The whale_scorer computes scores using a single complex query with RIGHT JOIN and a subquery for global_median_30d. If this query is slow on large datasets, it could delay the monitor cycle. Add a query timing log and consider adding an index on copy_trade_signals(wallet_id, created_at).
